recommendations.title: Three Perfect Daughters
recommendations.overview: Three families go into crisis when their daughters get engaged because they are convinced that their young daughters have all chosen a wrong partner.

recommendations.title: Dangal
recommendations.overview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Housefull 3
recommendations.overview: A father doesn't want his three daughters to get married. Now, it's up to three men to try to and convince the father that they're a good fit for his daughters.

recommendations.title: Wolfs
recommendations.overview: Hired to cover up a high-profile crime, a fixer soon finds his night spiralling out of control when he's forced to work with an unexpected counterpart.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: After a woman's at-home DNA test reveals multiple half-siblings, she discovers a shocking scheme involving donor sperm and a popular fertility doctor.

recommendations.title: Blade
recommendations.overview: The Daywalker known as "Blade" - a half-vampire, half-mortal man - becomes the protector of humanity against an underground army of vampires.

recommendations.title: Crimewave
recommendations.overview: A pair of whacked-out cartoon-like exterminator/hitmen kill the owner of a burglar-alarm company, and stalk the partner who hired them, his wife, and a nerd framed for the murder, who tells the story in flashback from the electric chair.

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: Daddy's Little Girls
recommendations.overview: Monty is a mechanic struggling to make ends meet as he raises his three young daughters. When the court awards custody of his daughters to his shady ex-wife, Monty desperately tries to win them back with the help of Julia, a beautiful, Ivy League-edu
